sections.heading: Definition
sections.content: Every type of writing demands distinctive style and approach. Candidates are expected to be able to write narrative, descriptive, expository, and argumentative essays.

sections.heading: Hints
sections.content:
1. Treat as many ideas in relation to the topic as can be discussed within the time allowed.
2. Present ideas in a new perspective and in an orderly manner.
3. Use appropriate and clear language.
4. Emphasize correctness of language.
5. Avoid bias or overzealousness.
6. Keep within the time allocated.

sections.heading: Evaluation
sections.content: Write an essay on ‘The day I will never forget’.

sections.heading: Weekend Assignment
sections.content: Revision and tests part 2, page 149, Effective English.
